settings.gg-y_CqzXB6_text:
Join us on Wednesday, April 15, from 17:00 to 20:00 BST for the 6th edition of the Hunt. 

By participating in this exclusive online event, you can save up to 50% OFF by hunting limited-use discount codes all over our website. Prove your eye for detail and look for the iconic items to catch the highest discount!
settings.gg0d_eP77C1_childItem_0: "Is there some reason that my coffee isn't here? Has she died or something?"
settings.gg4fN2z9TMC_text: Yes, everyone will see the same codes, but act fast: it’s first-come, first-served!
settings.gg52snXMYd9_text: Simply visit our website during the event and start searching for hidden items with discount codes before someone else uses them. We recommend using the desktop version to make sure you don't miss anything. It's also advised to prepare your order and be registered before the Hunt starts, so you can use your discount code as quickly as possible!
settings.gg9diQUVKNp_text: Fill your shopping cart or wish list before the Hunt, so you are ready to check out when you find a code.
settings.ggDNmwxrHo1_text:
Quick tips:
1. Use your desktop, it will make hunting much easier.
2. Follow us on Instagram and Facebook to get all the updates, tips & hints before and during the Hunt.

3. Some clues are already hidden on this page, with more coming to our social media in the next few weeks, so stay tuned!

*A Golden Envelope containing a £85 gift card will be hidden in one lucky order placed during the Hunt.
settings.ggEsv4dAgJe_text: Codes will be scattered across different pages of our website. Keep an eye on banners, product pictures, product descriptions, and even blog posts! Some clues are already hidden on this page, with more coming to our social media in the next few weeks, so stay tuned!
settings.ggHjyOAxlLq_childItem_0: "By all means, move at a glacial pace. You know how that thrills me."
settings.ggIAPbEF7i4_text: You can treat yourself, but note the maximum order value is €500 before the code is applied, and gift cards are excluded.
settings.ggMBsmrSOBt_text:
Important notes for your quest:

1. Codes can be used a limited amount of times. If the code you have found doesn’t work, it means it has already been used the maximum amount of times. Don’t get discouraged and keep hunting!
2. Codes can’t be combined with other discount codes.
3. Read the Terms & Conditions.

*The 50% codes will be hidden at 3 different times: 17:00 BST, 18:00 BST, and 19:00 BST.
settings.ggMT22uqDx9_childItem_0: "Don't be ridiculous, Andrea, everybody wants a discount… "
settings.ggOfgLUyQh3_text: Hunt down the specific items and their codes hidden everywhere on our website when the Hunt starts!
settings.ggRKkQMby9T_text: Found a code? Hurry and use it at checkout before someone else does!
settings.ggUmmImfIj9_text:
You’ve just been selected as Miranda Priestly’s new assistant at the prestigious Gloway Magazine, and your very first challenge has already been assigned.

 

The office is buzzing, phones ringing, emails pinging. A million girls would kill for this job, but surviving it takes more than ambition; you need a booster to keep you moving. Caffeine will be your friend in this endeavor.

 

Here, details are everything. And “on time”? That’s already late. When a meeting is set for 3:45, there’s no room for a glacial pace, Miranda expects her coffee ready before it even begins.

 

Prove what you’re capable of. This role demands speed and sharp multitasking, along with the ability to track down even the hardest-to-find items. And precision matters above all: don't go confusing truffle brown with caramel.

 

We can’t wait to see your skills in action. And remember: Miranda expects nothing less than flawless delivery.
settings.ggarI47kx87_text: Discounts vary! You may find 10%, 15%, 20%, 25%, 30%, or even 50% OFF discount codes!
settings.ggfF0Ytus9t_text: Yes, you will receive KS Points on the website you order from.
settings.ggfldlEt2d4_text: No, you must use your code before the event ends at 20:00 BST. After that, it will no longer be valid. Be fast, the codes have a limited number of uses, so others might claim them first!
settings.ggjyd24BNc__text: Try applying it at checkout and make sure to use it within the time of the event. If the code works, you’re in luck. If it doesn’t, it may have expired or reached its usage limit.
settings.ggkcB4kqFBF_childItem_0: "Please, bore someone else with your questions."
settings.gglPtvsAUkx_text: Yes, the Hunt is available on the app, but hunting on your desktop will be easier.
settings.gglrTOEMZBO_text:
3 different codes

Each usable once, released hourly during the Hunt*
settings.ggpqqAoA0Uj_text: Open your order to find out if you're the lucky winner of the Golden Envelope worth £85!*

Each usable once, released hourly during the Hunt*

settings.ggxe1I9-Ewi_childItem_9: Will the Hunt be available on all your websites?
settings.ggz7qPG4-6Z_text: Here are some examples of what the hidden codes could look like during the Hunt:

settings.ggGJFQxV2us_text: Korean Skincare | The Devil Wears Prada Hunt: Terms & Conditions
settings.ggchaZBRRvw_text:
1. General Information
The Hunt is only available on the following Korean Skincare online stores:

  • koreanskincare.com
  • koreanskincare.nl
  • korean-skincare.de
  • koreanskincare.co.uk
  • korean-skincare.fr

A limited number of discount codes are available for redemption. Find the discount codes hidden on the online Korean Skincare store from Wednesday, April 15, 2026 (17:00 – 20:00 BST) and redeem them to get 10%, 15%, 20%, 25%, 30%, or 50% off a new order.

2. How to Redeem a Discount Code
To use a discount code, follow these steps:

  1. Visit one of the Korean Skincare online stores listed above. 
  2. Add item(s) to your shopping basket. 
  3. Proceed to checkout. 
  4. Enter the discount code in the designated box and click ‘Apply.’ 
  5. Complete the payment for your order.

3. Discount Code Conditions

  1. Discount codes are subject to availability and must be redeemed on an order placed on the online Korean Skincare store where the code was found between Wednesday, April 15, 2026 (17:00 – 20:00 BST).
  2. Only one discount code can be applied per order.
  3. A maximum order value of 435 Pound sterling applies. Orders exceeding these limits will be cancelled.
  4. Discount codes cannot be combined with any other voucher, promotional, or discount codes.
  5. Discount codes are not available for Korean Skincare staff or employees of its group companies.
  6. Discount codes do not apply to KS Gift Cards.
  7. Discount codes do not apply to delivery charges. Please check the delivery terms and conditions online.
  8. Orders and free gifts are subject to stock availability. No cash alternative is offered.
  9. By redeeming a discount code, you agree to be bound by Korean Skincare's Terms and Conditions of Sale.
  10. Refunds will reflect the discount applied. The discount will be proportionally spread across the items purchased and will not apply to any replacements.
  11. Korean Skincare reserves the right to decline orders if a discount code is deemed invalid or linked to fraudulent activity.
  12. Korean Skincare reserves the right to change these Terms and Conditions or withdraw the promotion at any time with reasonable notice.
  13. The laws of the Netherlands govern these terms and conditions.

4. Discount Code Availability

  • 10% discount = 600 redemptions available
  • 15% discount = 500 redemptions available
  • 20% discount = 400 redemptions available
  • 25% discount = 100 redemptions available
  • 30% discount = 30 redemptions available
  • 50% discount = 3 redemptions available (one 50% code available every hour)

Breakdown of Code Usage:

  • 10% Discount: 10 different codes, each usable 60 times
  • 15% Discount: 10 different codes, each usable 50 times
  • 20% Discount: 10 different codes, each usable 40 times
  • 25% Discount: 5 different codes, each usable 20 times
  • 30% Discount: 5 different codes, each usable 6 times
  • 50% Discount: 3 different codes, each usable 1 time, (one 50% code available every hour)

5. The KS Gift Card (Golden Envelope)

  • The KS Gift Card is worth 85 Pound sterling and is valid for six months from April 15, 2025, to October 15, 2026.
  • The KS Gift Card can be used only once.

For any questions regarding the Hunt Event, please refer to our Customer Service team. Happy hunting!
